app.name: Sehat
landing.subtitle: A modern rehabilitation platform connecting patients with AI-guided recovery plans, daily tracking, and clinical oversight.
landing.feature1.title: Smart Plans
landing.feature1.body: Personalized recovery schedules generated by advanced clinical AI, adapting to your progress.
landing.feature2.title: Daily Tracking
landing.feature2.body: Log your pain levels and adherence seamlessly to see real trends over time.
landing.feature3.title: Clinical Oversight
landing.feature3.body: Clinicians get a birds-eye view of patient populations, spotting risk factors early.
role.title: Welcome to Sehat
role.subtitle: Tell us how you'll use Sehat so we can set things up for you.
role.patientDesc: Get a personalized recovery plan and track your progress every day.
role.adminDesc: Review patients, edit recovery plans, and add clinical notes.
onboarding.title: Welcome to Sehat
onboarding.subtitle: Let's personalize your recovery journey
onboarding.profileDesc: Tell us about your condition so our clinical AI can build your plan.
onboarding.symptoms.placeholder: Describe what you're feeling, when it started, and what makes it worse...
onboarding.history.placeholder: Any past surgeries, chronic conditions, or medications...
onboarding.report.help: Upload MRI, X-ray, or doctor's notes (PDF, JPG)
onboarding.error: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subscription.free: You are on the Sehat Free plan.
settings.subscription.paid: You are on the Sehat Premium plan.
learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Bite-sized recovery education from our partners at HealthBits360.
